To: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: Re: Dashboard review for tomorrow's steering

Hi R,

I had a look. Overall I think it is in good shape and ready for steering. The 14-week green run is impressive and shows strong delivery momentum.

A few small thoughts:

- The KPI row covers the main things — completion %, hours, risks, defects, satisfaction. Comprehensive.
- All six workstreams green is great. Tells the CISO the programme is in good hands.
- 93% milestone completion is a strong number. The CISO will appreciate seeing it.
- Defect count trending down is positive. Quality story is intact.
- 4.1/5 stakeholder satisfaction is a great endorsement.

For tomorrow, I would leverage the green KPIs as the headline narrative and lean into the milestone completion number. Good metrics drive good conversations.

If the CISO asks hard questions, the data on the dashboard should be enough to answer them. We have a lot of green to point at.

I would not propose any structural changes ahead of tomorrow — the dashboard is working and the CISO is used to this view. Changing it the day before steering could be disruptive and confuse the message.

Happy to help format anything for the slide deck if useful.

Best,
PC
